variables.notes: Chose 'Current interest bearing liabilities' outside the shortlist because it is the clean reported total of short-term interest-bearing debt on the balance sheet and excludes lease liabilities, which are separately shown as 'Current lease liabilities'. This is preferred over selecting only 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' because the latter may omit other short-term borrowings.
